note: AUD5 fix for finding F-06 (docs/flowmap/audit/04-findings.md). SCOPE: CI wiring + npm scripts, structure-only for the map — real verification is node --test tools/flowmap/gate-parity.test.mjs (2 tests failed pre-fix: CI did not consume spec:test:all; flowmap:verify:full did not exist).

intent.problem: attack A7: the CI and local gate chains diverged both directions — handoff:check, cert, plan-check, roadmap:audit, acceptance ran in CI only; slice-core and both flowmap-lint test files ran locally only. 'CI enforces the whole loop' and the local DONE banner were each true of a different list.
intent.approach: spec-gate.yml buildspec-tests consumes spec:test:all (package.json is THE canonical list; the locally-only tests land in CI by construction) and keeps the real-plan acceptance step; new flowmap:verify:full chains the five previously-CI-only gates for local parity; gate-parity.test.mjs — inside the suite — fails if a CI-only test enumeration reappears or verify:full loses a gate.
intent.rationale: one list consumed by both sides cannot diverge; the parity test makes the convergence self-enforcing rather than a convention.
